name: sfda-violation-classifier
description: دليل استرشادي لترشيح تصنيفات مخالفات SFDA من الجداول الرسمية

scripts.build:verified: node scripts/verify-approved-data.js && node test/all-rows-audit.js && node build.js
scripts.test:exhaustive: node scripts/verify-approved-data.js && node build.js && node test/smoke.js && node test/coverage-500.js && node test/coverage-all-1775.js
scripts.test:precision: node scripts/verify-approved-data.js && node build.js && node test/smoke.js && node test/precision-252.js
scripts.test:context: node scripts/verify-approved-data.js && node build.js && node test/smoke.js && node test/context-license-30.js
scripts.test: node scripts/verify-approved-data.js && node build.js && node test/all-rows-audit.js && node test/smoke.js && node test/coverage-500.js
